title: 4 Hour Tea Light Candles Unscented Tealights Candle White 200 Pack
features: Burning time: Our 4 hour tealights 200 pack candles provide a long-lasting lighting environment. The tea light candles are small in shape and have a bright flame. These 4 hour candles are perfect for all events.

High Quality: Our 4 hour tea lights candles are made with high-quality paraffin wax cotton wicks. This allows the tea light to burn for 4 hours straight without any problem. These 200 pack tea lights set is very efficient to burn clean and smokeless.
Multi-purpose: Each candle measures in at approx 38x23 mm. This lets you easily use the 200 pack tea lights set to decorate your house and restaurant to give it an inviting atmosphere.

Convenient: Our tea light candles have a 4hr tealights unscented candes burning period is perfect for weddings, parties, and restaurants to provide an ambient environment with our tea light candles 200 pack set.

Unscented: The unscented tealights can easily be used for multiple purposes. These 4 hour tealights 200 pack candles suitable for indoor and outdoor use and perfect for weddings, birthdays, parties, restaurants, massage parlours and more.
